author: lu_pinto
content: do you take branches? I can quickly increase the limits for besu and you could try with that? As you said it's pretty straightfoward

author: lu_pinto
content: one note though, one will have to increase the tx gas limit to allow for larger code sizes, I think the 16Mgas limit will have to double too which kind of defeats the tx parallelization bounds we have put in place in EIP-7825
